tasks.label: Export OpenSCAD Prototype STL Set
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}'; $out = Join-Path $PWD 'rfq\pla_prototype\stl'; $src = Join-Path $PWD 'rfq\pla_prototype\exports'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $out | Out-Null; Get-ChildItem -Path $out -Filter '*.stl' -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force; $exe = if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files (x86)\OpenSCAD\openscad.com') { 'C:\Program Files (x86)\OpenSCAD\openscad.com' } elseif ($env:OPENSCAD_EXE) { $env:OPENSCAD_EXE } else { 'C:\Program Files (x86)\OpenSCAD\openscad.exe' }; & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'prototype_lid_base_bundle.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_prototype_lid_base_bundle.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'prototype_hose_bundle.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_prototype_hose_bundle.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'prototype_hose_lid_base_bundle.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_prototype_hose_lid_base_bundle.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'prototype_support_frame.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_prototype_support.scad'); & (Join-Path $PWD 'rfq\pla_prototype\verify_prototype_stl_layouts.ps1')

tasks.label: Export OpenSCAD Prototype Support Service STL Set
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}'; $out = Join-Path $PWD 'rfq\pla_prototype\stl\support_service'; $src = Join-Path $PWD 'rfq\pla_prototype\exports'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $out | Out-Null; Get-ChildItem -Path $out -Filter 'support_*.stl' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force; $exe = if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files (x86)\OpenSCAD\openscad.com') { 'C:\Program Files (x86)\OpenSCAD\openscad.com' } elseif ($env:OPENSCAD_EXE) { $env:OPENSCAD_EXE } else { 'C:\Program Files (x86)\OpenSCAD\openscad.exe' }; & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'support_cradle_panel.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_support_cradle_panel.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'support_display_base.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_support_display_base.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'support_rear_deck.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_support_rear_deck.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'support_display_mast.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_support_display_mast.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'support_psu_upright.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_support_psu_upright.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'support_driver_spine.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_support_driver_spine.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'support_driver_shelf.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_support_driver_shelf.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'support_keeper.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_support_keeper.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'support_hose_tab.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_support_hose_tab.scad')

tasks.label: Export OpenSCAD Hybrid STL Set
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}'; $out = Join-Path $PWD 'rfq\final_hybrid_cnc\stl'; $src = Join-Path $PWD 'rfq\final_hybrid_cnc\exports'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $out | Out-Null; $exe = if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files (x86)\OpenSCAD\openscad.com') { 'C:\Program Files (x86)\OpenSCAD\openscad.com' } elseif ($env:OPENSCAD_EXE) { $env:OPENSCAD_EXE } else { 'C:\Program Files (x86)\OpenSCAD\openscad.exe' }; & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'cold_block_lid.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_lid.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'cold_block_base.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_base.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'hose_plug_main_16_0mm.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_plug_main.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'hose_plug_mid_15_4mm.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_plug_mid.scad'); & $exe -o (Join-Path $out 'hose_plug_small_14_8mm.stl') (Join-Path $src 'export_plug_small.scad')
